import React from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Star, MapPin, Briefcase, Edit, CheckCircle, Monitor } from 'lucide-react'; import PlatformLayout from '../components/platform/PlatformLayout'; import { Badge, StatusBadge } from '../components/ui/Badge'; import Button from '../components/ui/Button'; import { useAuth } from '../App'; import { useAppData } from '../context/DataContext'; import { testerStats } from '../data/mockData'; const fallbackSkills = ['Mobile Testing', 'Web Testing', 'API Testing', 'Fintech', 'E-Commerce', 'Accessibility']; const fallbackDevices = ['iPhone 15 Pro (iOS 17)', 'Samsung Galaxy S24 (Android 14)', 'MacBook Pro M3', 'Windows 11 PC']; const certifications = ['Nyvel Verified Tester', 'Fintech Testing Certified', 'Accessibility Specialist']; export default function TesterProfile() { const { user } = useAuth(); const { myApplications } = useAppData(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const skills = user?.skills?.length ? user.skills : fallbackSkills; const devices = user?.devices?.length ? user.devices.map((d) => (user.osVersions?.length ? `${d} (${user.osVersions.join(', ')})` : d)) : fallbackDevices; return (
{/* Profile header */}
{user?.name?.split(' ').map((n) => n[0]).join('') || 'MJ'}

{user?.name}

{user?.rating || '4.9'}
San Francisco, CA Software Engineer

Experienced QA engineer and beta tester with 5+ years testing mobile and web applications across fintech, e-commerce, and healthcare. Passionate about finding edge cases and delivering detailed, actionable bug reports.

{/* Stats */}

Stats

{[ { label: 'Tests Completed', value: user?.testsCompleted || 127, color: 'text-brand-600' }, { label: 'Total Earned', value: '$3,842', color: 'text-emerald-600' }, { label: 'Avg. Rating', value: `${user?.rating || '4.9'} / 5.0`, color: 'text-amber-600' }, { label: 'Acceptance Rate', value: '94%', color: 'text-brand-600' }, { label: 'Bugs Reported', value: '1,204', color: 'text-red-500' }, { label: 'Member Since', value: 'Jan 2024', color: 'text-slate-500' }, ].map(({ label, value, color }) => (
{label} {value}
))}
{/* Skills & devices */}

Testing Skills

{skills.map((s) => ( ))}

Devices & Platforms

{devices.map((d) => (
{d}
))}

Certifications

{certifications.map((c) => (
{c}
))}
{/* Recent test history */}

Test History

{myApplications.map((app) => ( ))}
Test Status Compensation Completed

{app.testName}

{app.company}

 ${app.compensation} {app.dueDate}
); }
